string.description: Binary-safe string value, the simplest Redis data type storing up to 512MB of data

list.description: Ordered collection of strings implemented as linked list, supports push/pop from both ends

set.description: Unordered collection of unique strings with O(1) add, remove, and membership test

hash.description: Map of field-value string pairs, ideal for representing objects

sorted_set.description: Set of unique strings ordered by a floating-point score, supports range queries

stream.description: Append-only log data structure with consumer groups for message streaming
